title: carduus assoi subsp. hispanica
intro: Carduus assoi subsp. hispanica, also known as Spanish thistle or cardo, is a subspecies of thistle native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Carduus assoi subsp. hispanica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
